title: School Management Executive #Hillcrest Road
description:
Working Hour

  • Mondays to Thursdays: 9:00am to 6:00pm, inclusive of 30 minutes lunch break
  • Fridays: 9:00am to 5:30pm, inclusive of 30 minutes lunch break
  • Service not required on Saturdays, Sundays and gazetted public holidays

Requirement

  • A Degree Holder or equivalent
  • Good communication and interpersonal skills
  • Good team player with a high level of initiative and independence.
  • Proficient in MS Office
  • Minimum 2 years working experience in schools.
  • Able to work in a fast paced environment

Job Scope
🎓Admissions Management

  • 📅 Senior High (SH) & Junior High (JH) Admissions:
    Handle admissions timelines – SH (April–July), JH (Mid-April–August, December).

  • 🧑‍🎓 Direct School Admission (DSA):
    Conceptualize the DSA process for both JH & SH, manage registration websites, maintain student databases, inform students/parents of test dates, assist with interview preparation, compile final lists, and support VP/Year Heads in responding to parent/student inquiries.

  • 📩 Appeals & Enrolments:
    Assist with DSA/Joint Admission Exercise (JAE) appeal cases and enrolments for returning Singaporean/International students.

👨‍🎓Junior High Student Matters

  • 🩺 Health & Dental: Coordinate health screening (Mar–Apr) and dental screening (Feb).

  • 🆔 NRIC & Surveys: Manage NRIC matters and Quality of School Experience (QSE) survey in July – align with student timetables and inform personal mentors.

  • 🤝 Parent-Teacher Meetings (PTM): Conceptualize and coordinate JH PTMs in April, June, July.

  • 🗣️ 3rd Language Updates: Liaise with the Language Centre regarding 3rd language programs.

  • 📝 Sec 1 Posting Exercise: Manage end-Nov to December posting activities.

  • 🏫 JH1 Orientation: Coordinate January orientation programs.

  • 🏛️ School Tours/Open House: Assist VP/Year Heads with website registration and school list analysis.

👨‍👩‍👧‍👦Parent Support Relations

  • 🤲 Parent-In-Action (PAACT) Support:
    Provide logistics for AGM, PAACT Executive Committee meetings, Principal–parent meetings, Teachers’ Day celebrations, and PAACT membership registration during JH1 Orientation. Communicate school event updates and MOE announcements to parents.

  • 💰 PAACT Fund Management:
    Liaise with PAACT on printing, assignment, and distribution of donation cards, and manage parent registrations.

📊Other Administrative Duties

  • 📝 Surveys: Conduct Learner Engagement Survey (by semester) and International Student Perception Survey.

  • 🕓 Reception Coverage: Cover reception duty from 4 p.m. to 6 p.m. daily.

  • ✅ Student Verification: Verify student information with HR agencies.

  • 🪪 Printing: Handle printing of name cards.

  • 🧑‍💼 Reception & SSC Coverage: Cover Student Services Centre (SSC) and reception as required.

  • 🪧 Development Projects: Manage signage, donor boards, and partnership boards.

🔄Ad-Hoc Administrative Support

  1. 🗓️ Event Day Support: Assist during PTMs, School Tours, and DSA registration days.

  2. 📧 Enquiries: Handle email and phone inquiries related to admissions and general student services.

Greensafe International Pte Ltd is a Consulting, Training, Auditing & Outsourcing organization dedicated to provide Workplace Safety & Health, Environmental and Quality services to various industries & workplaces.
